operations.label: Prepare meeting source cache
operations.description: Create or refresh the manual official-source cache structure used by blocked and browser-assisted public meeting providers.

operations.label: Download meeting sources with Playwright
operations.description: Run the allowlisted, headless Playwright collector for official public meeting pages and downloadable records.

operations.label: Import cached meeting records
operations.description: Parse cached official meeting files, refresh generated records, and rebuild the provider coverage report.

operations.label: Full meeting source refresh
operations.description: Collect allowlisted public meeting sources with Playwright, import cached files, and rebuild reports in one monitored run.

operations.label: Refresh Nevada SOS records
operations.description: Run the existing Nevada Secretary of State fetch, discovery, extraction, parsing, quality, and status pipeline.
